# Interface Contracts: Shelf

**Purpose**: Define exact skill inputs, outputs, and MCP tool usage patterns so parallel implementation produces consistent, compatible skills. This file is the single source of truth for how each skill interacts with MCP tools, CLI commands, and the user.

**Generated by**: `/plan`
**Consumed by**: `/implement` (all skills must match these contracts)

## Rules

- Every SKILL.md MUST follow the MCP interaction pattern defined here
- Every SKILL.md MUST handle MCP unavailability gracefully (warn, don't crash)
- Every SKILL.md MUST resolve the project slug using the same derivation logic
- Vault paths MUST use the configurable base path, never hardcoded paths

## Shared: Project Slug Resolution

All skills use this identical slug resolution logic:

```
# FR-004: Derive project slug
1. If argument provided: use it as slug
2. Else: run `git remote get-url origin`, extract repo name (last path segment, strip .git)
3. Store as $SLUG for all vault path construction
```

## Shared: Base Path Resolution

```
# NFR-003: Configurable base path
1. Check for .shelf-config file in repo root — read `base_path` if present
2. Default: "projects"
3. All vault paths: {base_path}/{slug}/...
```

## Shared: MCP Graceful Degradation

```
# NFR-004: Graceful degradation
Every MCP tool call MUST be wrapped in error handling:
- If MCP tool returns an error or is unreachable: print warning to user, skip that operation
- Never crash or throw — always continue to the next step or exit cleanly
- Report partial results if some operations succeeded
```

## Skill: shelf-create

### Inputs
- Optional: project name (slug override)
- Optional: `--tags "tag1, tag2"` (additional tags to merge)

### Outputs
- Created via MCP: `{slug}/{slug}.md`, `{slug}/docs/about.md`
- Created via MCP: empty directories `progress/`, `releases/`, `issues/`, `decisions/`
- Printed: confirmation message with project slug

### MCP Tool Calls (in order)

```
# FR-005: Check for duplicate
mcp__obsidian-projects__list_files({ path: "{base_path}/{slug}" })
  → If files exist: warn "Project already exists" and ABORT

# FR-029: Detect tech stack
Bash: check for package.json, Cargo.toml, pyproject.toml, go.mod, etc.
  → Map to namespaced tags (language/*, framework/*, product/*, infra/*)
  → Merge with --tags argument (FR-030)

# FR-002: Create dashboard
mcp__obsidian-projects__create_file({
  path: "{base_path}/{slug}/{slug}.md",
  content: "---\ntype: project\nstatus: idea\nrepo: {repo_url}\ntags:\n  - {tag1}\n  - {tag2}\nnext_step: \"\"\nlast_updated: {today}\n---\n\n# {slug}\n\n## Human Needed\n\n## Feedback\n\n## Feedback Log\n"
})

# FR-003: Create about.md
mcp__obsidian-projects__create_file({
  path: "{base_path}/{slug}/docs/about.md",
  content: "# About {slug}\n\n## Description\n{repo_description}\n\n## Tech Stack\n{detected_tags}\n\n## Architecture\nTBD\n"
})

# FR-001: Create directory structure (via placeholder files)
# MCP file creation implicitly creates parent directories
mcp__obsidian-projects__create_file({ path: "{base_path}/{slug}/progress/.gitkeep", content: "" })
mcp__obsidian-projects__create_file({ path: "{base_path}/{slug}/releases/.gitkeep", content: "" })
mcp__obsidian-projects__create_file({ path: "{base_path}/{slug}/issues/.gitkeep", content: "" })
mcp__obsidian-projects__create_file({ path: "{base_path}/{slug}/decisions/.gitkeep", content: "" })
```

## Skill: shelf-update

### Inputs
- Optional: `--summary "text"` — session summary
- Optional: `--status "in-progress"` — project status
- Optional: `--next-step "text"` — what to do next
- Optional: `--decision "text"` — decision made this session
- Optional: human-needed items (detected from conversation or explicit)

### Outputs
- Updated via MCP: `{slug}/{slug}.md` (frontmatter + Human Needed section)
- Created/appended via MCP: `progress/YYYY-MM.md`
- Optionally created via MCP: `decisions/YYYY-MM-DD-{slug}.md`
- Printed: confirmation of what was updated

### MCP Tool Calls (in order)

```
# FR-012: Read before write
mcp__obsidian-projects__read_file({ path: "{base_path}/{slug}/{slug}.md" })
  → Parse existing frontmatter and Human Needed section

# FR-011: Resolve inputs
If no --summary: analyze git log + conversation context, ask user

# FR-008: Ensure monthly progress file exists
mcp__obsidian-projects__read_file({ path: "{base_path}/{slug}/progress/YYYY-MM.md" })
  → If not found: create it with header

# FR-007: Append progress entry
mcp__obsidian-projects__update_file({
  path: "{base_path}/{slug}/progress/YYYY-MM.md",
  content: "{existing_content}\n\n## YYYY-MM-DD\n\n**Summary**: {summary}\n\n**Key outcomes**:\n- {outcomes}\n\n**Links**: {pr_links, commit_links}\n{decision_link if applicable}\n"
})

# FR-031, FR-032, FR-033: Decision record (if applicable)
If --decision or decision detected:
  mcp__obsidian-projects__create_file({
    path: "{base_path}/{slug}/decisions/YYYY-MM-DD-{decision_slug}.md",
    content: "---\ntype: decision\ndate: YYYY-MM-DD\nstatus: accepted\n---\n\n# {decision_title}\n\n## Context\n{context}\n\n## Options Considered\n{options}\n\n## Decision\n{decision}\n\n## Rationale\n{rationale}\n"
  })

# FR-009: Update dashboard frontmatter
# FR-010: Update Human Needed section
mcp__obsidian-projects__update_file({
  path: "{base_path}/{slug}/{slug}.md",
  content: "{updated_frontmatter + updated_human_needed + preserved_sections}"
})
```

## Skill: shelf-sync

### Inputs
- None (fully automatic)

### Outputs
- Created/updated via MCP: issue notes in `{slug}/issues/`
- Printed: sync summary (N created, N updated, N closed, N unchanged)

### Tool Calls (in order)

```
# FR-013: Read GitHub issues
Bash: gh issue list --repo {repo} --state all --json number,title,state,labels,body,updatedAt --limit 100

# FR-014: Read backlog issues
Bash: ls .kiln/issues/ (if directory exists)
Bash: cat each .kiln/issues/*.md file

# Read existing Obsidian issue notes
mcp__obsidian-projects__list_files({ path: "{base_path}/{slug}/issues" })
For each existing note:
  mcp__obsidian-projects__read_file → extract last_synced from frontmatter

# FR-017: Skip unchanged issues
Compare updatedAt with last_synced — skip if unchanged

# FR-013, FR-014, FR-015, FR-018: Create/update issue notes
For each new/changed issue:
  mcp__obsidian-projects__create_file or update_file({
    path: "{base_path}/{slug}/issues/{slug-from-title}.md",
    content: "---\ntype: issue\nstatus: {open|closed}\nseverity: {from_labels}\nsource: \"GitHub #{number}\" or \"backlog:{path}\"\nlast_synced: {now}\n---\n\n# {title}\n\n{body}\n"
  })

# FR-016: Close resolved issues
For each closed GitHub issue with open Obsidian note:
  mcp__obsidian-projects__update_file → set status: closed
```

## Skill: shelf-feedback

### Inputs
- None

### Outputs
- Printed: feedback items with suggested actions (or "no feedback")
- Updated via MCP: dashboard (feedback moved to Feedback Log)

### MCP Tool Calls (in order)

```
# FR-022: Check project exists
mcp__obsidian-projects__read_file({ path: "{base_path}/{slug}/{slug}.md" })
  → If not found: suggest /shelf-create and RETURN

# FR-019: Extract Feedback section
Parse content between "## Feedback" and next "##" heading

# FR-023: Check for empty feedback
If no items: report "No feedback" and RETURN

# FR-020: Display and suggest actions
Print each feedback item with categorized suggestion:
  - "Fix: ..." → suggest /fix
  - "Scope: ..." → note for next planning session
  - Other → informational note

# FR-021: Archive to Feedback Log
Move items from ## Feedback to ## Feedback Log with [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM] prefix
mcp__obsidian-projects__update_file({
  path: "{base_path}/{slug}/{slug}.md",
  content: "{content with feedback moved to log}"
})
```

## Skill: shelf-status

### Inputs
- None

### Outputs
- Printed: formatted status summary (read-only, no writes)

### MCP Tool Calls (in order)

```
# FR-028: Check project exists
mcp__obsidian-projects__read_file({ path: "{base_path}/{slug}/{slug}.md" })
  → If not found: suggest /shelf-create and RETURN

# FR-024: Read dashboard frontmatter
Parse: status, next_step, last_updated, blockers

# FR-025: Read latest progress entry
mcp__obsidian-projects__list_files({ path: "{base_path}/{slug}/progress" })
  → Sort by filename descending → read latest file → extract last entry

# FR-026: Count open issues
mcp__obsidian-projects__list_files({ path: "{base_path}/{slug}/issues" })
  → For each: read frontmatter → count where status != closed

# FR-027: Display Human Needed items
Parse ## Human Needed section from dashboard

# Print formatted summary
```

## Skill: shelf-release

### Inputs
- Optional: `--version "1.2.0"` — version override
- Optional: `--summary "text"` — human-readable one-liner

### Outputs
- Created via MCP: `releases/v{version}.md`
- Appended via MCP: progress entry in `progress/YYYY-MM.md`
- Printed: confirmation

### Tool Calls (in order)

```
# FR-035: Detect version
Bash: cat VERSION || node -p "require('./package.json').version" || git describe --tags --abbrev=0
  → Or use --version argument

# FR-038: Check for duplicate
mcp__obsidian-projects__read_file({ path: "{base_path}/{slug}/releases/v{version}.md" })
  → If exists: warn "Release note already exists" and ABORT

# FR-036: Generate changelog
Bash: git log {previous_tag}..HEAD --oneline --no-decorate
Bash: git log {previous_tag}..HEAD --merges --oneline (for PR numbers)

# FR-037: Resolve summary
If no --summary: prompt user for a one-liner

# FR-034: Create release note
mcp__obsidian-projects__create_file({
  path: "{base_path}/{slug}/releases/v{version}.md",
  content: "---\ntype: release\nversion: \"{version}\"\ndate: YYYY-MM-DD\nsummary: \"{summary}\"\n---\n\n# v{version}\n\n{summary}\n\n## Changelog\n\n{changelog_entries}\n"
})

# FR-039: Append progress entry
(Same pattern as shelf-update's progress append)
mcp__obsidian-projects__update_file({
  path: "{base_path}/{slug}/progress/YYYY-MM.md",
  content: "{existing}\n\n## YYYY-MM-DD\n\n**Summary**: Released v{version} — {summary}\n\n**Links**: Release note\n"
})
```
